news.headline: Harfang Exploration Inc to acquire NewOrigin Gold Corp in definitive agreement to consolidate assets; NewOrigin shareholders to own 20% of Harfang Shares.
news.summary: In Montreal and Toronto, on August 9, 2024, Harfang Exploration Inc. (TSX.V: HAR) and NewOrigin Gold Corp. (TSX.V: NEWO) have officially entered into a definitive arrangement agreement on August 8, 2024. According to the Agreement, Harfang is set to acquire all the outstanding common shares of NewOrigin, subject to specific conditions. Post-transaction, it is anticipated that NewOrigin shareholders will possess around 20% of Harfang's common shares.

news.headline: Five9 stock drops premarket after reporting Q2 revenue of $252.1 million, adjusted gross margin at 60.5%, EBITDA at $41.8 million, and EPS of $0.52 above consensus.
news.summary: Five9, Inc. (NASDAQ:FIVN) saw a decline in shares following the release of their second-quarter 2024 earnings report. The company reported a revenue of $252.1 million, surpassing the expected $245.2 million. Adjusted gross margin dropped to 60.5% from 61.8% compared to the previous year. Adjusted EBITDA increased to $41.8 million from $41.5 million year-over-year. Operating cash flow for the quarter was $19.9 million. Adjusted EPS of $0.52 exceeded the anticipated $0.44. Chairman and CEO Mike Burkland expressed satisfaction with the strong second-quarter results, marking a significant achievement for the company.
